summary: Mixed show with an exciting first set but a second set hampered by overbearing Hornsby keyboards; recording quality not discussed
review: The reviewer rates the first set as very good and exciting, while the second set feels messy due to aggressive Hornsby keyboard work that overwhelms songs like "Saint" and "Comes A Time," with Garcia apparently stepping back. No comments are made about the audio source or fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single, moderate‑rating review; performance is split between strong and weak parts and there is no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix balance, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised as exciting; second set described as a mess with keyboards overwhelming the material.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is said to defer to Hornsby, implying subdued playing.
band_member_comments.Keys: Hornsby's aggressive keyboard playing overruns tunes he doesn't fully know.
